programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Seventy-year-old widower Ben Whittaker has discovered that retirement isn't all it's cracked up to be. Seizing an opportunity to get back in the game, he becomes a senior intern at an online fashion site, founded and run by Jules Ostin.

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27 - EP 3
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 7
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 2
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall - EP 1
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa’s Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: Talking Point - EP 2
programme.desc: That new house smell. Is it making you sick? Possibly. There’s been a surge in formaldehyde removal services. How much should you worry? And what can you do about it? Steven Chia finds out.

programme.title: Crimewatch 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: A baby’s uncontrolled cries lead to a violent assault. Watch how officers from the Criminal Investigation Department work together with GRF officers and IOs from various Land Divisions, as well as forensic experts from the Health Sciences Authority, to expose the offender’s desperate cover-up and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Clean it, Fix it – Series 4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Master builder and household favourite Tommy Walsh, expert pro cleaner Maxine Dwyer and creative carpenter Asher Edwards help people across the UK to renovate and improve their homes. The team has two days to transform a living space in desperate need of some love. Series 4 sees enterprising co-presenter Mark Wright and a new expert de-clutterer join in the challenge of making tired homes relievable – without breaking the bank.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1 - EP 26
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.desc: A major event at the restaurant goes disastrously wrong when a health inspector arrives — and a shocking discovery is found in Aunty Lee’s food, putting the business in serious jeopardy.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into Thailand With Sue Perkins - EP 4
programme.desc: Sue Perkins is set to get lost in Thailand and promises to offer a unique blend of adventure, culture, and humour. The series follows Sue as she embarks on an extraordinary journey across three regions of Thailand, pushing her limits and diving deep into the country’s rich culture.

programme.title: Code of Silence - EP 3
programme.desc: When the police ask Deaf catering worker Alison to lip-read criminals' conversations, she is plunged into a high-stakes new world. Her assessment of the gang’s clandestine meetings quickly becomes key to unlocking the investigation. But as she finds herself increasingly drawn to one of the suspects, Alison’s feelings about the case become complicated.

programme.title: The Good Ship Murder S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: As the cruise ship arrives in Sicily, a deadly family saga unfolds involving a successful businessman, his children and his new wife. When death strikes, was it a Mafia hit or someone closer to home?.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 54
programme.desc: A major event at the restaurant goes disastrously wrong when a health inspector arrives — and a shocking discovery is found in Aunty Lee’s food, putting the business in serious jeopardy.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 13 关键证人
programme.desc: Dex and Da Peng bring Dan Nong to the freezer warehouse, where they interrogate him to reveal the mastermind behind the village massacre. Dan Nong refuses to speak. Guo Ying and her two partners track them down, and Dex urges Da Peng to leave, but Da Peng holds Dan Nong hostage and forces Guo Ying to retreat. Meanwhile, the police arrive. Upon seeing there's no way out, Da Peng kills Dan Nong.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 14 关键证人
programme.desc: The Hong Kong police want Nick, who used to be an undercover agent, to testify in court for a gang vendetta case. However, the gang kidnaps him, ties him up and dumps him into the sea. As Nick was on the brink of death, Guo Ying and her two partners arrive in time, and Zhi Ming plunges into the waters to rescue him.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 19 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Blossom pretends that she is pregnant and asks Jia Hong for money, forcing Jia Hong to rob. Shu Juan and Xiao Long want Jia Hong to bring Blossom to meet them. Shu Juan exposes that Blossom is not pregnant, and that she wants to cheat Jia Hong's money. Blossom's motives are exposed, and in a fit of anger, she breaks up with Jia Hong. Jia Hong is heartbroken, and he takes his anger out on Shu Juan, as he is unhappy that she has broken them up.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 20 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Xi Yue sleeps with Yu Jie after getting drunk. Feeling regretful, she quickly goes back home. Yan Xun apologises to Xi Yue that he is unable to celebrate their wedding anniversary. He gives her a gift, and informs her that he will be going overseas to work. Xi Yue becomes emotional. Yan Xun finds out that Xi Yue has an affair, and is taken aback by the news. Xi Yue is unable to face Yan Xun, so she leaves the house. Yan Xun confronts Yu Jie aggressively, and demands Yu Jie to leave the house.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 13 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

He realises that paper offerings that are brought to life return to ashes after 100 days and is anxious that Cheng doesn’t have much time left. Liang Yan appears in Liang’s dream and tells him that Cheng can be saved if someone takes his place.

Collagen Peptide Manuka Honey Drink supports skin, joint, and bone health while boosting hydration and elasticity. Night Rejuvenating Manuka Honey is the world’s first honey designed to protect the liver with rejuvenating properties that provides detoxification while you sleep. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Start ""refueling"" the cartilage and synovial fluid early so that the joints can be used for a longer time! 果冻形态的关节保健品，含葡萄糖胺、软骨素、第2型胶原蛋白、抗炎草本等关节保健营养素，有助于修复软骨和缓解关节发炎症状，味道好，容易服用又方便。提早开始给软骨和滑液“加加油”，关节才能用得久、用得顺！

programme.desc: Sleek and lightweight Thermos Mug with strainer for you to enjoy your tea to the fullest. Suitable for everyday use! 一杯多用， 茶水分离, 设计典雅的茶漏咖啡杯让你方便携带！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions. I-Running X-Fold折叠运动脚踏车，设计时尚小巧，配有舒适座垫、可调阻力和LCD显示屏，支持手机App连接，适合家庭健身使用。其折叠设计节省空间便于收纳，帮助您在家轻松进行有氧运动，保持体能、身形和肌肉量。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Knee TENS
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go. OMRON 膝盖电疗仪是一款非药物、非侵入式的膝部护理设备，采用微电流技术TENS，有效缓解膝盖疼痛与僵硬感。产品轻巧易用，通过温和电脉冲刺激神经、促进血液循环，帮助缓解因关节炎、运动伤害或过度使用引起的不适。多段强度可调，贴合膝盖设计，提供精准、舒适的护理体验。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: The mysterious sea captain Billy Bones arrives at the Benbow Inn only to meet an untimely death. Shortly afterwards the innkeeper's son receives the 'black spot' and a faded treasure map. After consulting with his two trusted friends, they set sail for .

programme.title: The Hellbenders
programme.desc: After the civil war, a hell-bent Confederate Army Officer and his sons rob a Union Caravan carrying a fortune, killing every man and beast in the process. They hide the money in an empty coffin and hire a woman to pose as a widow to a dead officer to make it look official. Now they must con and fight their way across the west through thousands of cavalry, lawmen, bounty hunters, and Indians to make their escape.

programme.title: My Name Is Nobody
programme.desc: A young, easygoing gunman worships and competes with an old gunfighter who only wants to retire.

programme.title: Eagle's Wing
programme.desc: A white trapper steals a white mustang called "Eagle Wing" from a Kiowa Indian, who pursues him to get his horse back.

programme.title: Sonny Boy
programme.desc: A small-town crime boss accepts delivery of a stolen car, only to find there's a baby in the back-seat. He and his transgender wife cut out the boy's tongue and raise him as a mute accomplice in their crimes. When the grown "Sonny Boy" escapes and tries to make contact with the outside world, the attention he draws to his warped family results in darkly-humored mayhem.

programme.title: Dreamscape
programme.desc: A man who can enter and manipulate people's dreams is recruited by a government agency to help cure the President of the United States of his nightmares about nuclear war but stumbles upon an assassination plot.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Red Bull - EP23
programme.desc: Red Bull's opportunities to compete in F1 are limited by the calendar, but the team and the promotion campaign never stop outside of the track, the team begin famous for its astonishing demonstration races.

programme.desc: We focus on the cutting-edge team of Grand Prix, Red Bull Racing.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep1 - EP101
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Shaq's Secret Birthday - EP126
programme.desc: Nothing goes right when planning for Shaq's secret birthday surprise.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep5 - EP5
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Peace and Harmony - EP108
programme.desc: In this episode of Kids' Planet, we will make a trip to discover what two important words mean: "Peace" and "Harmony". Our friend Curious who knows everything will guide us through the universe of values, teaching us a very important quality in "Kindness", and we will learn to reject violence, manage anger, make good decisions, and have self-control.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Habits - EP109
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that habits are the result of repeating good action until it becomes part of our routine. All of our activities are very important! That's why you should give a very special place for rest, for having fun, and for sharing with your friends and family. We will also learn about the importance of punctuality!

programme.desc: With a rainstorm approaching, Dee has playtime in his room and makes a new little friend.

programme.desc: Queenie is too big to go through the fancy carwash she saw on TV, the Shaq Paq has to find a way to cheer her up.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Great Bouncing Eyeballs! / Rock It to the Moon - EP123
programme.desc: When Von Bolt has trouble with his eyes, The Secret Lab Kids grow an assortment of fantastical eyeballs but when they accidentally get bounced all over town it means big trouble! / When Von Bolt accidentally destroys the museum’s new moon rock, the Secret Lab Kids must find a way to replace it.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Alien Mayhem! | Episode 1, 2, 3
programme.desc: God’s Gang faces insane challenges - from stopping a mad scientist to battling aliens and saving blue whales.

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | The Cotton Candy Conspiracy | Episode 1
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Blue Whales and Reptilian Ruses | Episode 2
programme.desc: God's Gang embarks on an underwater mission to rescue blue whales, only to encounter an alien ambush. The team faces unexpected challenges while trying to infiltrate a clandestine blue whale party. Suspense builds as they attempt a daring rescue operation.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Chuck the Cherry Picker helps Harvey
programme.desc: Harvey needs a helping hand harvesting fruits from the tall trees! Troy selects the best truck to help: Chuck the Cherry Picker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Frank the Fire Trucks saves Gary
programme.desc: Uh-oh, Gary the Garbage truck is on fire! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Frank the Firetruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Amber the Ambulance helps Ethan
programme.desc: Ethan the Dumptruck feels sick; he ate too much candy! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Amber the Ambulance!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Ethan The Dumptruck collects the bouncy balls
programme.desc: Pickle dumped a tonne of bouncy balls on the motorway! Troy selects the best truck to help her: Ethan the Dumptruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Dane's Wrecking Ball causes mayhem
programme.desc: Dane's wrecking ball accidentally fell off and knocked Frank! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Hector the Helicopter!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Christopher getsstuck in cement
programme.desc: Christopher fell asleep and woke up covered in concrete! Troy selects the best truck to help release him: Dane the Crane!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BUILDING BLOCKS, FALLING TOWERS – ROOKIE AND THE MOLE
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large box full of building blocks. He starts building towers, but they keep collapsing whenever he looks away. He discovers a hole in the ground with nothing inside, but curious as ever, he presses a button to inflate himself and blows into one of the holes, causing the troublemaker, a friendly mole, to pop out. Rookie catches his new friend , and together they set up an amazing building.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - HAPPY BIRTHDAY TOOO YOUUUUU! ROOKIE AND THE BIRTHDAY BASH
programme.desc: In the final episode of the second season, Rookie hears suspicious noises and begins to investigate. But he can‘t find the source! When he finally opens a door, he is greeted by a confetti cannon - a surprise birthday party! All his friends are gathered around a cake with two candles, and at the little turtle’s count, they all join in singing ‘Happy Birthday’ together!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Show do Jacarelvis
programme.desc: O Jacarelvis tenta fazer um show quando uma abelhinha aparece em seu caminho, esse imprevisto pode se tornar uma grande parceria!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Papa Tudo
programme.desc: Ao som de um gostoso rock vamos todos comer direitinho, o Jacarelvis e amigos mostram como é bom e gostoso comer de tudo um pouco e como e importante os legumes e frutas nas refeições.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Escovo os dentes
programme.desc: Um divertido reggae feito para ajudar as crianças durante a escovação dos dentes, tornando esse momento divertido e prazeroso.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Minha Escola
programme.desc: Uma homenagem bem didática ao segundo lar de muitas crianças!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Da Aqui
programme.desc: Aprenda sobre as frutas e alguns de seus benefícios ao ritmo de um Rock'n Roll!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Castigo
programme.desc: Vamos tentar entender esse tal de castigo ao som de um divertido blues !

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Mico Tuco
programme.desc: O Mico Tuco te cutuca nesse rockabilly que não vai deixar ninguém parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tem que limpar
programme.desc: Tudo que suja, molha ou quebra precisa de alguém pra ajeitar, não é mesmo? O Jacarelvis e seus amigos mostram como ajudar a mamãe e o papai de uma forma divertida e segura.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacare Careca
programme.desc: Uma divertida cantiga que brinca com a sonoridade do nome dos animais.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Submarino
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, Chip y sus amigos caen a un lago donde son recogidos por la nave espacial de un átomo de sodio, que los lleva a Sodia, una ciudad submarina. Allí, los átomos de sodio y cloro viven un largo conflicto. El cloro quiere unirse al sodio para formar moléculas de cloruro de sodio, mientras que los átomos de sodio prefieren permanecer juntos. La patrulla de antimateria entra en contacto con el cloro y les propone proporcionarles rifles para dominar al sodio y así obligarlos a molecularizarse, pero Chip se burla de la antimateria y logra que el cloro y el sodio dejen de ser enemigos, restableciendo la paz en el mundo submarino.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - La tormenta
programme.desc: Dentro de un viejo molino de viento, en medio de una fuerte tormenta, Chip y sus amigos esperan que pase y continúan su camino. Afuera, bajo el viento tempestuoso, la patrulla de antimateria le comunica al Dr. No que ya han encontrado al niño. El malvado científico confía en que esta vez no fallarán. Pero cuando el viento amaina, Chip idea una estrategia y deja a la antimateria encerrada en el molino, mientras él y los átomos siguen adelante.

programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Beach Rescue

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Sign

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Super Fire Truck
programme.desc: Frank is teaching Robo and Booster the basics of a firetruck when Zitron starts a fire using fireworks. Time to merge!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Pumpkin Pie Stand
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Zitron spooks Carrie and throws pies at everyone at the farm. It's time to stop the mischief.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Halloween Tricks

programme.title: Grojband

programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: The Chase S16 - EP 22
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 126
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Password US - Series 2 - EP 13
programme.desc: Iconic word-guessing gameshow Password returns with The Tonight Show host Jimmy Fallon as one the celebrity players accompanied by Nope actress Keke Palmer as host. Contestants face off in the ultimate game of words, competing to win up to 25,000 by guessing a secret password from only single-word clues.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 55
programme.desc: When Yanna quits the restaurant after confessing her role in its sabotage, the gang hires an unexpected new helper — a robot vacuum — and Salim’s relationship with Nina is exposed to the public.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Long Weekends - EP 5
programme.desc: We're headed to the lesser known part of Thailand - Hat Yai for this week on Long Weekends! Get ready for a mix of food adventure, nature hikes, speakeasy and not forgetting to make a stop at a local perfume shop to customise a new scent for perfume girly - Ann Nicole! Will we be able to keep within the 600 budget? Watch on and find out!

programme.title: Scene City: Codetta
programme.desc: Can you rekindle a memory through music? Elle, a pianist tutor in her late teens, was taken aback and at a loss when her latest student, Madam Yeow, an elderly woman, seems to be suffering from dementia. How do you teach a skill set to someone who is suffering from memory loss? Despite her condition, the lesson continued - Madam Yeow would not be able to recognise Elle during the lesson, and Elle would simply return and start all over again.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Ingrid's lies come back to haunt her when her sister Gigi needs to be treated by the team after she develops side effects to the secret treatments Ingrid put her through. Also, Watson and Mary bond over a tragedy.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 55
programme.desc: When Yanna quits the restaurant after confessing her role in its sabotage, the gang hires an unexpected new helper — a robot vacuum — and Salim’s relationship with Nina is exposed to the public.

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 7 双子星
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Gourmet Chef Thermo Blend
programme.desc: All new blender solution, which integrates the functions of juicer, soymilk and cooking! 搅拌后直接在同一个机器里料理的搅拌料理机，还提供多功能模式

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: South Melbourne Market
programme.desc: Each team must serve two dishes in one of four market-friendly ways at the famous South Melbourne Market.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: Eight contestants must survive three rounds if they are to keep their food dream alive.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box Challenge: Yotam Ottolenghi & Invention Test
programme.desc: Yotam Ottolenghi's mystery box challenge gives contestants 75 minutes to create a delicious dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Yotam's Mezze Feast
programme.desc: The three contestants with the least impressive dishes from the invention test must cook-off to avoid elimination

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers in the invention test must first face off for a chance to cook against a professional chef for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: Vegetarian Feast
programme.desc: Each teams must prepare a Yotam Ottolenghi-style vegetarian feast for a group of meat lovers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Visual Perception Elimination Challenge/Masterclass
programme.desc: The seven members of the losing team from the vegetarian feast challenge are facing elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test: Curtis Stone
programme.desc: Contestants must create a delicious dish from ingredients found in the Mystery Box set by chef Curtis Stone.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Deniz Karaca's Passion for Caramel
programme.desc: The bottom four contestants from the invention test must now cook-off in the Pressure Test

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Second Chance
programme.desc: 12 of the previously eliminated contestants now have a chance to cook their way back into the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: Pop-Up Restaurant
programme.desc: Matt Sinclair is on hand to mentor contestants in a pop-up restaurant team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The six members of the losing team from the pop-up restaurant challenge enter the kitchen facing elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Heston Blumenthal Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Heston Blumenthal week. Heston takes the top 12 contestants on a road trip through regional Victoria.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: Earth
programme.desc: Contestants have 75 minutes to cook one main and one dessert that must incorporate the element of earth.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Team Challenge: Air
programme.desc: The contestants must cook dishes inspired by 'air' in teams of four.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Invention Test: Fire
programme.desc: Contestants have 60 minutes to cook a savoury dish inspired by fire.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Elimination Challenge/Masterclass
programme.desc: The contestants return to the kitchen after their four-day road trip for the Elimination Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test
programme.desc: Contestants have an hour to create a dish from the Mystery Box ingredients, only three dishes will be tasted.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Pressure Test: Paul Carmichael's Bajan Fish Fry
programme.desc: The contestants have three hours and 45 minutes to recreate Paul Carmichael's Bajan fish fry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 09 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers from the invention test now compete for a chance at immunity.

programme.title: Sonny Boy
programme.desc: A small-town crime boss accepts delivery of a stolen car, only to find there's a baby in the back-seat. He and his transgender wife cut out the boy's tongue and raise him as a mute accomplice in their crimes. When the grown "Sonny Boy" escapes and tries to make contact with the outside world, the attention he draws to his warped family results in darkly-humored mayhem.

programme.title: Dreamscape
programme.desc: A man who can enter and manipulate people's dreams is recruited by a government agency to help cure the President of the United States of his nightmares about nuclear war but stumbles upon an assassination plot.

programme.desc: A white trapper steals a white mustang called "Eagle Wing" from a Kiowa Indian, who pursues him to get his horse back.

programme.title: Top 10 - Most Eligible Bachelorettes - EP196
programme.desc: Top Trace is the exclusive rating of the champions who are currently causing a buzz in the sporting world!

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Women's Tennis - EP4
programme.desc: Williams, Navratilova, Court, Lenglen? The claimants to the title of greatest female tennis player of all time.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Goalkeepers - EP12
programme.desc: Who is the greatest goalkeeper of all time?

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Contest - EP102
programme.desc: Biggie D enters a truck pull contest but soon realizes he'll need more training to win the gold.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep5 - EP105
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep6 - EP6
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Habits - EP109
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that habits are the result of repeating good action until it becomes part of our routine. All of our activities are very important! That's why you should give a very special place for rest, for having fun, and for sharing with your friends and family. We will also learn about the importance of punctuality!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go on an expedition to the Planet of Forgiveness and learn that forgiveness is an act of love that helps us overcome anger and misunderstandings and that when we forgive we see things with more clarity. And most importantly, when we recognize our mistakes we realize the importance of asking for forgiveness through our hearts.

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep23 - EP123
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Love is in the Airhole | Episode 3
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | What's Cooking | Episode 4
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Mystery Ally in the Flames | Episode 5
programme.desc: A forest trip turns into chaos when wildfire strikes! With no tech, the gang must unite to survive. Just when hope fades, a glowing hero appears. Who is it?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Trials of KungFuda | Episode 6
programme.desc: A forest in flames. A rising fear. Enter Kungfuda, the mystery kicker who pushes God’s Gang to unlock their true power. Can the gang overcome fear and awaken as true Forest Guardians before darkness consumes it all?

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Digger Train
programme.desc: Billy the Bulldozer's trapped in the tunnel! Teddy turns Troy into a digger to rescue his poor friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Demolition Train
programme.desc: Little Tina is trapped under a building! Teddy and Troy waste no time and devise a plan to rescue her.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy Scissorhands
programme.desc: Billy and Taylor need help clearing the tracks; they're full of overgrown weeds. Teddy transforms Troy into a giant pruning train.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Lifeguard
programme.desc: Henry has fallen into the lake and needs urgent help! Troy transforms into a lifeguard to rescue his friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Film Director
programme.desc: Tony needs someone to film his daring stunt and enlists Troy's help. Teddy transforms him into a camera rig!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nadar
programme.desc: Glub, glub, glub! Aprenda os estilos de natação e os cuidados com a água na hora de nadar!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tambem sou um animal
programme.desc: Somos todos animais, e se temos os nossos bichinhos, não podemos deixar de cuidar deles com carinho!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Quem eu sou
programme.desc: Uma brincadeira musical sobre nossas confusas relações de parentesco!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Barulhinho bom
programme.desc: Um rock que nos ensina que a música pode ser feita por qualquer um a qualquer hora!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Brincar
programme.desc: Nada de ficar parado! Mais que brinquedos, para brincar é preciso muita imaginação e energia!Nada de ficar parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nana, Girafinha
programme.desc: Depois do agito, deixe a criançada relaxar ao som de uma gostosa bossa-nova!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarelvis 02
programme.desc: O mundo fica ainda mais divertido com a ajuda dos amigos do Jacarelvis!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Banho eu vou tomar
programme.desc: Agora ficou fácil dar o banho das crianças com essa animada canção!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - O Lixo e o meu tesouro
programme.desc: Uma aventura pirata que ensina sobre geração de lixo e reciclagem! Arrá! Iourrou!

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Altamira
programme.desc: Chip y los átomos entran en una cueva llena de pinturas en las paredes. Una puerta bloquea el paso a la cueva en un lugar donde se apilan células de elementos químicos y un horno. Siguiendo las indicaciones de las pinturas y con la ayuda del libro de química de Chip, descubre que debe mezclar y fusionar varios elementos para crear unos zapatos de vidrio con los que pueda caminar sobre un suelo lleno de ácido, de modo que la puerta se levante y pueda seguir el camino. Cuando las antimaterias intentan seguirlo, mientras mezclan productos químicos, estos les aplastan la nariz.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - La carga
programme.desc: Un transporte cargado de nitratos se dirige a la Torre Negra para que el Dr. No prepare explosivos. Chip se cuela en el transporte con la intención de ser llevado a su destino, pero al darse cuenta de la carga, hace todo lo posible para evitar que caiga en manos del malvado científico. Así, con la ayuda de átomos de bromo prisioneros, logra destruir el transporte y su peligrosa carga.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Snow Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron joins a friendly snow fight between the cars, but soon uses his Zitronic to trap them in ice cubes!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Basketball Game
programme.desc: Zitron derails a fun basketball game between the cars. Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - UFO Invasion
programme.desc: A UFO steals everything on its path in Car City! Robo teams up with Rocky to stop the UFO and Zitron.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Strongest Truck
programme.desc: Zitron challenges the cars to a strength contest, but turns Marley into the Hulk, and he's completely out of control!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Fresh & Clean
programme.desc: Baby Frank's been playing at the paint shooting range as in covered in it! Tom gets him all shiny again.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: Baby Hector's spent the afternoon jumping in puddles; the mud got his blades stuck! Time for a trip to the carwash.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Beehive
programme.desc: Jeremy's crashed into a beehive and is covered in honey! Tom helps him get rid of the sticky stuff.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Rusty Chuck
programme.desc: Chuck’s Cherry picker arm is rusty and stiff. He goes to Tom’s Car Wash to get cleaned up and oiled up!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Playdate
programme.desc: Baby Amber got all dirty while playing with Baby Matt. Tom giver her an emergency carwash and a polish.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - Cheer Mia Up
programme.desc: Miranda makes a cure to cheer up Mia, but she runs out of Happy Bird Eggs!

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - A Contest
programme.desc: Max and Mike argue about who is the strongest monster

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - The Magnetic Rock
programme.desc: Miranda takes a drive through the forest and hears a humming noise coming from a rock on the side of the mountain, which suddenly pulls her towards it

programme.title: Monster Town - Monster Town - Chasing Mia
programme.desc: Mia is blown away in a strong wind while trying to retrieve Miranda's kite, and the Monster Trucks are in pursuit!

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!
